## Process

1. Understand — Map the business, friction, customer journey, data, opportunities.
2. Design — Shape the right mix of strategy, AI, automation, technology, software.
3. Build — Execute with quality, speed, clarity.
4. Improve — Refine based on performance and new opportunities.
